title: Acoridium wenzelii
taxonomy: Acoridium wenzelii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is part of the genus Acoridium, which is a group of orchid-like plants. The family Asparagaceae is a large and diverse group of monocots, including plants such as asparagus, hyacinth, and lilies. Acoridium wenzelii is a rare and endemic species found in the Philippines. This classification suggests that Acoridium wenzelii is a unique and specialized member of the Asparagaceae family.
